name: Hop Step Sing! VR Live „ÄäHop‚òÖSummer Tour 2020„Äã
short_description: Hop Step Sing!'s first VR live performance, „ÄäHop‚òÖSummer Tour 2020„Äãis now available on Steam! Put on your VR goggles and enjoy the 360-degree immersive live concert experience you had never seen before!
detailed_description:
„ÄêHop Step Sing! VR Live „ÄäHop‚òÖSummer Tour 2020„Äã„Äë



Hop Step Sing!'s first VR live performance, „ÄäHop‚òÖSummer Tour 2020„Äã, which was held in Japan in October 2020 and later expanded to Greater China and North America, is now available worldwide!

Dive into a 360-degree immersive concert experience tailored for VR headset enthusiasts. Join Niina, Shikiri, and Mikasa as they serenade you with six captivating songs, ranging from their debut hit, "Kisekiteki Shining!" to their latest chart-topper, "Astral Piece." Revel in the refreshed stage designs and their dazzling costume updates. The immersive VR environment lets you cheer for your favorite idols from any viewpoint or proximity of your choosing. English and Chinese language support and Romanji Karaoke system incorporated! As a special treat, the voice actresses themselves will grace the stage as guest stars! Come to experience and enjoy the ever-hottest stage of Hop Step Sing!



„ÄêAbout Hop Step Sing!„Äë
A coming-of-age success story of three girls who aim to reach the pinnacle of the idol world using VR technology. Since 2017, they have been active in various media, including the release of a total of 5 VR music videos, Nico Nico Live Stream program „ÄäHop Nama„Äã, and series of comics.

„ÄêCast„Äë
Niina Nijikawa: Maria Sashide
Shikiri Shiishiba: Mariko Toribe
Mikasa Minowa: Natsumi Hioka
